column1: # connotation-wordlist.tsv — cross-language profanity / slang / unfortunate-meaning screen
# Format: term<TAB>lang<TAB>severity   (term len >= 3; substring-matched against the normalized name)
# ADVISORY ONLY — a flag is a prompt for the adversarial challenge, never a hard kill and never a
# clearance. Non-exhaustive and curated; extend via /ideate:self-improve when a real miss surfaces.
# Lines starting with # are ignored. Data rows are EXACTLY three tab-separated fields (no inline
# comments). lang codes: en/es/fr/de/it/pt/sv/mul(multi). severity: low|medium|high.
